rationale_source: TT=construction: ARCHITECTURE-AMENDMENT-CANDIDATE per DECISIONS-NEEDED.md #3 — spec captures expected behavior assuming Vienna canonical_map supports construction-specific attributes (draw_schedule, completion_date, projected_completion_value)

transaction_type.rationale: F1.TT — ASSUMES TT enum extension to include construction.

property_value.rationale: F1.PV current land value; construction-specific projected-completion-value ($900k) in extraText — not canonical field today.

ltv_at_current_value.rationale: $620k / $280k current land value = 221% LTV-to-current. Sanity-violation-shape per F1.PV<F1.LA pattern (A17 anchor).

ltv_at_completion.rationale: $620k / $900k projected-completion = 69% — only valid LTV math for construction. Architecture-amendment: construction-specific math required.

workflow_state.rationale: Held pending architecture-amendment confirmation per Layer 3 #3.

layer3_pending_decisions.scope: construction loan support — draw schedule + projected-completion-value canonical fields
